violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -The scoop for mozzarella cheese is laying in the product. Handle is in contact with the product.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -The counter corners by the pizza warmer have begun to peel apart and is covered with clear tape.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Small cardboard boxes used for the bread sticks and personal pizzas are stored facing upward and should be stored upside down to prevent contamination.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. The counter top by the food warmer has clear tape on it. The counter top behind the front hand sink has laminate coming off with exposed wood.
